text.title: AI Accessibility Automation 2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: AI generates VPAT and emails customer without human signoff. ADA complaint later cites the inaccurate VPAT.
antipattern.root-cause: Sign-off step skipped to ship faster.
antipattern.fix: Hard-block VPAT distribution until human a11y lead signs; watermark drafts.

antipattern.symptom: AI alt text shipped on every image including editorial. Brand voice off; some product names misread.
antipattern.fix: Restrict auto-accept to decorative / low-stakes images with confidence ≥ 0.8; route editorial to human writer.

antipattern.symptom: Hotfix deploys skip the a11y scan. Regressions slip in under the radar.
antipattern.fix: Remove the skip flag; if scan time is the issue, run a fast a11y-smoke subset on hotfixes.
